data.name: PlatformNotSupported_Msmq
data.value: MSMQ is not supported on this platform.

data.name: MsmqPoisonMessage
data.value: The transport channel detected an incoming message that cannot be processed and that exceeded the configured allowed retries. Refer to the inner exception for details of the failure, and the documentation for the MsmqPoisonMessageException class for further guidance.

data.name: MsmqNonNegativeArgumentExpected
data.value: The value of this argument must be non-negative.

data.name: SFxTimeoutOutOfRange0
data.value: Timeout must be greater than or equal to TimeSpan.Zero. To disable timeout, specify TimeSpan.MaxValue.

data.name: SFxTimeoutOutOfRangeTooBig
data.value: Timeouts larger than Int32.MaxValue TotalMilliseconds (approximately 24 days) cannot be honored. To disable timeout, specify TimeSpan.MaxValue.

data.name: ChannelTypeNotSupported
data.value: The specified channel type {0} is not supported by this channel manager.

data.name: MsmqSendNotYetImplemented
data.value: The MSMQ send channel is not yet implemented in this build of System.ServiceModel.Msmq.

data.name: MsmqListenerNotSupported
data.value: The MSMQ client package does not support building channel listeners. Use CoreWCF to host an MSMQ service.

data.name: MsmqInvalidScheme
data.value: The scheme of the URI is not valid for this MSMQ address translator.

data.name: MsmqWrongUri
data.value: The MSMQ queue URI is missing the host segment.

data.name: MsmqUnexpectedPort
data.value: A port may not be specified on a net.msmq queue URI when using the native MSMQ transport protocol.

data.name: MsmqWrongPrivateQueueSyntax
data.value: Private queues are addressed using '/private/<name>' in net.msmq URIs. The legacy '/private$' syntax is not supported.

data.name: MsmqMessagingNotAvailable
data.value: The MSMQ.Messaging assembly could not be loaded. Add a PackageReference to the MSMQ.Messaging NuGet package to your application so System.ServiceModel.Msmq can dispatch messages to the underlying queue.

data.name: MsmqOpenQueueFailed
data.value: Failed to open the MSMQ queue at format name '{0}'. See InnerException for the native MQ_ERROR_* code.

data.name: MsmqSendFailed
data.value: The MSMQ send operation failed with native error 0x{0}. See InnerException for the underlying MQ_ERROR_* code.

data.name: MsmqMessageAlreadyFrozen
data.value: The native MSMQ message buffer has already been finalized and cannot accept additional properties.

data.name: MsmqInvalidMessageId
data.value: The MSMQ message id is not in the expected 'GUID\COUNTER' format.
